description_long: This object is a solid, angular jersey barrier made from a gray, concrete-like material. Its surface is slightly textured, with a matte finish that diffuses light rather than reflecting it. The barrier has a trapezoidal profile with a broad, stable base and a narrower top, designed to deflect vehicles and provide a physical separation in urban environments. The sides are straight and sharply angled, with no visible openings, handles, or interactive components. There are no markings, reflective strips, or signs of graffiti on its surface, and the object appears to be in excellent condition with no visible damage or wear. Its robust construction and weight make it suitable for use along roadsides, medians, or construction zones to control vehicle and pedestrian movement.
description: A solid, gray concrete jersey barrier with a trapezoidal profile and a slightly textured, matte surface. It is unmarked and undamaged, designed for urban traffic control.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow, triangular profile and the full height of the barrier.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, flat face and the full length of the barrier.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, identical to view 0, showing the triangular profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the long, flat face.
